title: Methods for monitoring environmental impact of chemical production
abstract: The disclosure relates to the field of sustainable industrialization, in particular the monitoring of environmental impact in industrial manufacturing processes. The disclosure relates to methods, apparatuses, input materials, output materials, network nodes, data services and validation services for validating environmental impact data associated with input material to be used for the production of one or more output material(s), wherein the environmental impact data relates to one or more environmental properties of the input material.
claims:
Claims Claims: 1 . A method for validating environmental impact data associated with input material to be used for a production of one or more output material(s), wherein the environmental impact data relates to one or more environmental properties of the input material, the method comprising the steps of: â¢ providing at least one identifier associated the input material, environmental impact data associated the input material and one or more validation input(s) associated with the generation of the environmental impact data; â¢ providing a validation rule set including one or more validation rules configured to validate the environmental impact data based on the generation of the environmental impact data associated with the input material; â¢ selecting at least one validation rule from the validation rule set for at least one of the validation inputs and generating at least one validation score by applying the at least one selected validation rule to the at least one provided validation input; â¢ depending on validation score assigning validated environmental impact data to the at least one identifier associated with the input material. 2. The method of claim 1 , wherein the one or more validation input(s) relate to one or more properties associated with input material production data used to generate the environmental impact data. 3. The method of any of the preceding claims, wherein the one or more validation input(s) relate to a technological correlation between the production used to generate the environmental impact data and the production used to produce the input material. 4. The method of any of the preceding claims, wherein the one or more validation input(s) relate to a geographical correlation between the production used to generate the environmental impact data and the production used to produce the input material. 5. The method of any of the preceding claims, wherein the one or more validation input(s) relate to a temporal correlation of the input material production data used to generate the environmental impact data, wherein the temporal correlation of the input material production data includes the age of the input material production data used to generate the environmental impact data and/or the time range of the input material production data used to generate the environmental impact data. 6. The method of any of the preceding claims, wherein the one or more validation input(s) relate to a share, quantity or quantity share of input material the validation input(s) are related to. 7. The method of any of the preceding claims, wherein the at least one validation rule is selected based on an environmental impact data type associated with the provided environmental impact data and/or a validation input category associated with the provided validation input(s). 8. The method of any of the preceding claims, wherein the at least one validation rule is configured to generate a validation score based one or more properties associated with input material production data used to generate the environmental impact data. 9. The method of any of the preceding claims, wherein the at least one validation rule is configured to generate a validation score based on a technological correlation, a geographical correlation and/or a temporal correlation of input material production data used to generate the environmental impact data to the input material provided to the production. 10. The method of any of the preceding claims, wherein the provided environmental impact data is validated if the validation score indicates that the provided environmental impact data is at least partially valid environmental impact data, wherein at least the validated part of the environmental impact data is assigned to the at least one identifier associated with the input material; or wherein the provided environmental impact data is not validated if the validation score indicates that provided environmental impact data is at least partially non-validated, wherein non-validated part of the environmental impact data is replaced by reference environmental impact data, wherein the reference environmental impact data is assigned as validated environmental impact data to the at least one identifier associated with the input material; or wherein the provided environmental impact data is not validated if the validation score indicates that provided environmental impact data is at least partially non-validated, wherein the input material is not provided to the production. 11. The method of any of the preceding claims, wherein the validation scores per validation input are aggregated and validated environmental impact data is assigned to the at least one identifier associated with the input material based on the aggregated score. 12. The method of any of the preceding claims further comprising the step of providing validated environmental impact data for monitoring the environmental impact of the production producing the of one or more output material(s) from the input material. 13. An apparatus for validating environmental impact data associated an input material to be used for a production of one or more output material(s), wherein the environmental impact data relates to one or more environmental properties of the input material, the apparatus comprising: â¢ a data providing interface configured to provide at least one identifier associated the input material, environmental impact data associated the input material and configured to provide one or more validation input(s) associated with the generation of the environmental impact data; â¢ a rule providing interface configured to provide a validation rule set including one or more validation rules configured to validate the environmental impact data based on the generation of the environmental impact data associated with the input material; â¢ a validation engine configured to select at least one validation rule from the validation rule set for at least one of the validation inputs, configured to generate at least one validation score by applying the at least one validation rule to the at least one provided validation input and depending on validation score configured to assign validated environmental impact data to the at least one identifier associated with the input material. 14. Use of environmental impact data validated according to any of the methods of claims 1 to 12 or by the apparatus of claim 13 for monitoring the environmental impact of a production of one or more output material(s) from one or more input material(s) associated with the validated environmental impact data and/or for generating environmental impact data associated with one or more output material(s) produced based on one or more input materials) associated with the validated environmental impact data. 15. An input material associated with environmental impact data and one or more validation input(s) for validating the environmental impact data according to the methods of any of claims 1 to 12 or by the apparatus of claim 13 or an output material associated with 

environmental impact data, wherein the environmental impact data is generated based on environmental impact data associated with one or more input material(s) used to produce the output material, the environmental impact data associated with the one or more input material(s) being validated according to the methods of any of claims 1 to 12 or by the ap- paratus of claim 13.
